name: Maret first observation anchors identity and profile facts

source.purpose: First visible introduction captures pronoun, age band, and load-bearing profile comparison facts.

input.playerInput: Approach the fuel desk and ask for Maret.

narrator.prose: Maret Coll looks up from the fuel desk. He is older than the Synod profile suggested, closer to fifty than forty, with a registry badge turned inward.

payload.name: Maret Coll
profile_facts: Synod profile suggested Maret Coll was younger than he appears.
payload.retrieval_cue: Maret Coll at the fuel desk

creates.source_quote: He is older than the Synod profile suggested
